description.value: You don't need to raise your voice. The right look, the right silence, the right moment and the creature across from you suddenly remembers it has somewhere else to be.

system.benefits: As 1 [Combat] action, choose one creature within 30 feet that can see or hear you. Target makes [[/save type=will]] (opposed by your Charisma + Intimidation). If you win, target is Frightened until end of your next turn
